title: notifications-mail — trait composition
description: One owned entity: MailSuppression. Composition follows foundation's canonical trait-order contract.

framework.reason: Suppression may be revoked — soft-delete preserves audit trail.

foundation.reason: Platform-blocklist entries (known bounce farms) carry is_system=true.
Every suppression addition + removal audit-logged for compliance evidence.
Provider-specific bounce metadata (bounce_reason, bounce_kind) captured on ingest.
Admin surface filters by reason / provider / added_at.

tenancy.reason: tenant_id NULL = platform-wide suppression (known invalid addresses, spam-trap domains). tenant_id set = tenant-specific suppression.

mail_suppression.notes: is_system=true reserved for platform-wide blocks (known bounce farms). Never Importable/Exportable — the suppression list is regulatory evidence that must not be moved off-platform.
